title: dysolobium lucens
intro: Dysolobium lucens, also known as the golden orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dysolobium lucens include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Dysolobium lucens is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made by boiling the roots and leaves in water or ethanol to extract its medicinal compounds.
